reminder.notes:
New app icon and alarm screen colors follow the app theme

### Features

- New app icon: a checklist notepad with a green checkmark on a green gradient, replacing the
  previous calendar icon on blue. Matches the app's own accent color.
- The alarm ring screen's Dismiss button and loading-state color now use the app's green theme
  accent instead of a hardcoded red.

### Bug fixes

No user-facing bug fixes in this release.

ai-scanner.notes:
# AI Scanner 1.2.1 — deleted photos no longer come back, plus rescan controls

A folder with 20 photos was scanning as 120 when 100 "deleted" photos were still sitting in the trash. Fixed, plus new ways to rescan and reset.

### Features

- Rescan folder now. A new Settings action re-checks your folder: it picks up newly added photos and drops any you've deleted, without touching the rest.
- Reset & rescan. Clears everything the app has scanned and scans your folder from scratch, including the duplicate check. Your photos are never touched.
- Scan image button. The home button is now a clearly labelled "Scan image" — tap it to pick any single image from anywhere on your device and scan just that one.

### Bug fixes

- Deleted photos are no longer scanned. Photos you delete go to the trash but stay on disk for a while; the app was counting those as if they were still there (a folder of 20 could show as 120). Trashed, binned and hidden files are now ignored, so the count matches what's really in your folder.
- Deleting a photo now removes it from the app. Entries whose photo has been deleted or trashed are cleared automatically on the next scan, so what you see always matches what's on disk.

mirrordrive.notes:
# MirrorDrive 0.13.2

### Features
- No new features. This release fixes the in-app updater and one playback behavior.

### Bug fixes
- The in-app update check now actually works on a real phone. It previously gave up after 8 seconds while the network request itself could take up to 20, so on a normal mobile connection the check was abandoned before it finished and the update prompt never appeared. The check is now non-blocking: the app opens immediately and the update screen appears as soon as a new version is found.
- Deleting a file that is currently playing now stops playback at the same time, instead of continuing to play a file that no longer exists.

twinclean.notes: Diagnostic fix: the 'Connect Google Drive' failure path now shows the real underlying error instead of a generic message, so sign-in issues can actually be diagnosed. No feature changes.
